name: Freezer Mix Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In an ungreased baking pan, 13x9x2 inches or a baking dish, 11 3/4x7 1/2x1 3/4 inches, layer half of the noodles, meat sauce, cottage cheese, and mozzarella cheese. Repeat the layers.
3. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the top.
4. Bake uncovered until hot and bubbly, about 40 minutes.
5. To prepare the frozen mix, dip it in hot water just to loosen.
6. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat the frozen mix, oregano leaves, parsley, and water to boiling.
7. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
8. Uncover and continue simmering, stirring occasionally, until the mix is thawed.
